query:
-- Insert default settings for Sports Day 002
INSERT INTO `sports_day_settings` (
  `eventId`,
  `earlyPrice`,
  `futurePrice`,
  `priceIncreaseAt`,
  `isPriceIncreaseActive`,
  `publicTeamRevealAt`,
  `topProductionCutoffAt`
) VALUES (
  'sports_day_002',
  2500,  -- £25.00 in pence
  3500,  -- £35.00 in pence
  DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 8 DAY),  -- 8 days from now
  false,
  '2026-07-11 08:00:00',  -- July 11, 2026 at 08:00 UTC
  '2026-06-27 23:59:00'   -- June 27, 2026 at 23:59 UTC (10 days before Sports Day)
) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `updatedAt` = NOW();
command:
